title: Kasam Tere Pyaar Ki
desc: Rishi brings Tanuja home, leaving everyone elated. Ahana feels Rishi has accepted Tanuja as his wife. But, he has other plans. What are they? Later Rishi breaks the news of Tanuja's return to. S01 E241.

title: Kasam Tere Pyaar Ki
desc: Despite her feelings for Rishi, Tanuja requests Rishi to move on from their relationship. Rishi puts forward a condition that he will think about his second marriage only after she marries. S01 E242.

title: Kasam Tere Pyaar Ki
desc: Tanuja feels that it is better for her to commit suicide than to marry someone other than Rishi. She stands at the edge of a bridge ready to plunge into a raging river below. Is this the end. S01 E243.

title: Kasam Tere Pyaar Ki
desc: Rishi returns home and to everyone's utter shock brings along Tanuja with him. Rano gets annoyed seeing Tanuja and puts forward a proposition to make her enter the home. Will Tanuja and Rishi. S01 E244.

title: Kasam Tere Pyaar Ki
desc: Tanuja accidentally reveals a moment that Rishi had spent with Tanu in the past. While Rishi suspects her to be Tanu, she fears that he will discover that she remembers everything about her. S01 E245.
